text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $64k with modest gains, while Ethereum's sluggish 0.3% move signals weaker conviction in the larger altcoin complex despite broader recovery. The Fear & Greed index at 23 reflects extreme fear that's beginning to lift, yet the $49B daily volume remains subdued for a market of this size, suggesting traders are still cautious and positioned defensively. Bitcoin's 56.2% dominance indicates capital is clustering in the safest major asset rather than spreading into alternatives—a typical risk-off posture even as sentiment edges upward.
